pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target compiler settings with the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to specify the target JDK version in modern Maven compiler plugin configurations, replacing the deprecated/legacy source/target pair for cleaner configuration.

src/main/java/org/prebid/cache/handlers/.general_idea: Replace Lombok's `val` keyword with Java 10+ `var` to remove dependency on Lombok's type inference feature.
Replace Lombok's 'val' keyword with Java 10+ 'var' to remove dependency on Lombok for local variable type inference.
